results.check_summary: Alternating arithmetic streams replay the prefix.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE: odd terms increase by 4; even terms decrease by 2.

results.check_summary: Periodic deltas replay as arithmetic phase sequences.
results.rule_summary: PDELTA: phase deltas are 5,8,11,... and constant -3,-3 in the other phases.

results.check_summary: Growing negative-step blocks and increasing positive jumps replay the prefix.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK with block steps -10,-14,-18,-22,... and polynomial block starts.

results.check_summary: Periodic affine growth extrapolated from the alternating high-growth pattern.
results.rule_summary: AFFINE with repeating phase multipliers and polynomially varying biases.

results.check_summary: Polynomial continuation inferred from the high-order finite-difference trend.
Phase-interleaved continuation inferred from the repeated multi-stream structure.
Successive differences follow a linearly decreasing second-difference sequence.
results.rule_summary: POLY: second differences decrease by 5 each step.

results.check_summary: Periodic modular/affine continuation inferred from the bounded irregular prefix.
Two interleaved streams have arithmetic first differences.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE: odd-stream differences decrease by 11; even-stream differences decrease by 11.

results.check_summary: Interleaved stream continuation inferred from phase-specific polynomial behavior.
Each term is twice the previous term minus one.
Affine multiplier 2 with alternating polynomially varying phase biases.
